productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girls Printed Yellow Top
description: Style Note Cute and charming, this top from gini and jony is a must buy for your little one's summer collection. Comfortable and soft, this top can be coupled with shorts, skirts and jeans and a pair of comfy shoes for your kid's perfect play date attire. Product Details Bright yellow top with cap sleeves, round neck, flaring pin tucks at the neckline, pink and blue flower rubber prints with gold thread embroidery Material and Care 95% cotton and 5% lycra Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print /embroidery
